hero.badge: Remote Contract Data Engineer — JN-062026-574854 · Contract-to-Hire
hero.description: Data engineer with fifteen years building ELT pipelines, governed SQL transformations, and analytics workflows in regulated enterprise and industrial operations environments. Expert Python and SQL for data processing, automation, and pipeline support on Azure-leaning Databricks platforms. Contract delivery spans ingestion through tested production releases with documented logic, data quality monitoring, and Agile collaboration. Available immediately for remote contract-to-hire work from northern Illinois.

highlights.label: Data engineering, ETL and ELT pipelines, Python, SQL, Azure Databricks, data modeling, query optimization, data quality monitoring, Power BI, PySpark familiarity, Git, Agile delivery, pipeline documentation, stakeholder communication, remote contract delivery

items.title: Contract Data Engineering and Pipeline Specialist
bullets: Built and maintained batch ELT workflows on Databricks in Azure-leaning environments with Python and SQL transformation logic for governed analytical datasets.
Supported ingestion and integration from multiple enterprise sources with reconciliation checks and exception reporting before downstream teams relied on the data.
Documented pipeline assumptions, field logic, and release notes for code review and handoff in Agile delivery cycles.

items.title: Contract SQL and Analytics Workflow Engineer
bullets: Tuned SQL across lakehouse and relational sources for recurring reporting, ad hoc extracts, and performance sensitive operational loads.
Partnered with analytics and operations stakeholders to scope pipeline work and deliver tested outputs with clear status updates.

items.title: Contract Data Validation and Pipeline QA Analyst
bullets: Executed validation routines comparing pipeline outputs to source extracts with defect tracking in regulated environments.

groups.title: Data engineering
items: ETL and ELT pipelines, data modeling, query optimization, data quality monitoring, pipeline troubleshooting, technical documentation

items: Azure Databricks, Python, SQL, Power BI, relational databases, Git, Azure cloud data platform patterns

items: Agile collaboration, code review participation, remote contract collaboration
